caption:
Every unanswered call is a lead calling your competitor next. The real leak is the sixty seconds after the call goes missed, when nobody follows up.

Fix it with an automated text that fires the second a call goes unanswered. The lead gets a reply before they dial the next number, and you get a second shot at the job with zero manual work.

Set it up this week. DM 'MISSED' and I'll send the exact script and the setup steps, free.

#HomeServices #HVACMarketing #RoofingBusiness #ContractorTips #ServiceBusiness #LeadGeneration #MissedCallTextBack
rationale: Carousels drive the highest saves and re-serve reach right now. This one hands over the full text-back script instead of teasing it, which is what turns saves into DMs.
